case_title: SMITH, ALCOMBRIA L. VS JO, KUK HAN DBA ROGER CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JO, KUK HAN DBA ROGER CONSTRUCTION CO.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-05-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-12-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, ALCOMBRIA L. AS TO DEFENDANT JO, KUK HAN DBA ROGER CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING A KOREAN INTERPRETER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-06-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT TO BRING A KOREAN INTERPRETER.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-06-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-05-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1000. CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D IN 6-MO. INTERVALS UNTIL PAID IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE
DISMISSED W/ PREJ. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $85.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON 4/30/05 & ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JO, KUK HAN DBA ROGER CONSTRUCTION CO. NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
